description:
Hello Admins

Match-2024-06-01_21-36-21-73
Match ID: 5c905a96-be37-483d-ad8b-82611c1ee0bb

Had a weird match today at 10:00 with people who speak my national language - swiss-german, which is very very rare. most swiss victory players speak french in the game.

The aim of one player was extremely strange. It was a very precise hand control but small uncontrolled jumps on the opponents and details can be seen again and again that remind of cheats with a soft aimbot. e.g. round 2, 2min 09seconds.

In the last two rounds he was really weirdly off. He was probably changing the cheat settings.

After the game, we asked very kindly if we could play. I have enclosed the screenshots that show that his disc name is linked to his ingamename name - the text message.

With him on the Discord it went very quickly . After a bit of raving from my side and that I have no problem with cheats, he showed us his cheats very quickly - screenshot cheat engine.

hopefully the information is enough, if not please mention what i forgot. His friends were funny too. Recoil, Movment, gamesens , Aim just didn't fit together. But our friend said and that the others weren't obvious enough for a ban for closetcheating to go through :(

Greetings Simom

latest_comment.message: This report does not include enough evidence for a ban. Please re-submit the report with more evidence.

description:
I have pointed and numbered out the times the mentioned player is clearly cheating in the match. In the first clip, he does not drone at all and is confident no one is near him. In the second clip, you can see him walling as pointed out by constantly checking behind the walls. In the third clip, you can see, he checks out the attackers coming from spawn below the floor wall and when he goes down he is aware of the window and looks left while completely ignoring the door on the left being certain no one is at the door. Despite looking left, he ran out and looked right a few moments after the player went away being certain no one was to his left anymore in the third clip. The fourth clip is just me showing his in-game name through r6tracker.


If I am missing any vital evidence or if this isn't enough, let me know and I shall provide further evidence from other rounds.
